visitors.title: Visitors
visitors.description: Tracking metrics for unique visitors count on ArabPrompt

count.description: The current verified unique visitor count

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the counter was last incremented

users.title: Users
users.description: Securely tracks registered users synced with Firebase Auth

uid.description: Unique Google user ID matching authenticated user

email.description: Google verified email of the user

displayName.description: Human-friendly display name of the user

photoURL.description: Avatar image link of the logged-in user

emailVerified.description: Whether the Google email is verified by Auth

createdAt.description: Timestamp when user profile was created in Firestore

lastActive.description: Timestamp when user was last active

history.title: Prompt History Items
history.description: Engineered prompts history generated by the user

id.description: Unique locally generated prompt history ID

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this generation was saved

originalText.description: The original short user core input concept

optimizedText.description: The fully engineered prompt generated by Gemini

actionType.description: Operation type: generate, refine, translate, or reverse

isFallback.description: Whether elegant client-side fallback was used

styleImage.description: URL of source layout or style imagery if in copy mode

contentImage.description: URL of the content guide imagery

isFavorite.description: Whether the item is starred by the user

visitors/{id}.description: Contains metadata and the singular global counter tracking visitor numbers securely

users/{userId}.description: Contains private and public profile data for Google authenticated users

users/{userId}/history/{itemId}.description: User specific prompt history log saved to the cloud
